title: 有馬記念の後に・皇帝君臨

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Wooooo! Long live the Emperor! Long live the
Emperor!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Trainer... These cheers. Are they...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I see... So I won.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So in the zone you didn't even realize it? That's
unlike you.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But you know, you look pretty rad when you're
following your heart! ♪

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Maruzensky...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You have my thanks.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I could not have achieved such focus against
anybody else. I enjoyed myself so much because
it was you I was racing against.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Geez, you can't drop a line like that when you
just made me eat your dust.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hah. Well, allow me to rephrase.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Maruzensky. You were quarry fit for
an Emperor.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Still with the hunting stuff? Lame-o!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hahaha... Forgive me. I couldn't resist.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Fine, I'll let you off the hook. But only 'cause of
that cute smile.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hasta la vista, Emperor. But you'd better watch
your back, or next time I really will gobble you
up! ♪

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hah... Next time, she says.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Even if there is a next time, I doubt I'll be able to
run like I did today.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's strange. I feel like I became one with the race
itself.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
This race should have required all of my
concentration and resourcefulness.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But all I could think about was the joy of it. The
wind on my face, the movements of the racers,
the pounding of my feet on the track...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It was... fun. A lot of fun. Perhaps the most fun
I've ever had while racing.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And it's all because you encouraged me to
compete as I truly am.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You helped me recall the primal desire that draws
all Umamusume to the track.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I see now that racing is enjoyable for its own
sake... And at the end of a race well run, there
lies bliss.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I want all Umamusume to feel the joy I feel right
now. And so I shall hold my ideals high.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now more than ever, I must strive toward those
ideals with all my might. And that is why I require
your help.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
After all, it's not only Umamusume who can show
the world the joy of racing.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Will you stay by my side, Trainer? Will you
continue to indulge this wild dream of mine?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I gaze into Symboli Rudolf's eyes and see the
resolve therein, I realize that here, now, I'm
witnessing the birth of the true Emperor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click! Flash! Click!

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf! How do you feel about your
victory?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: It seems the press is calling. Perfect timing.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Would you mind gathering the reporters? I would
like to start the press conference right away.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Greetings, ladies and gentlemen. I hope you will
forgive my formalities.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I come before you today to tell you about the
Emperor's dream.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
My dream is to create a world where all
Umamusume can live in bliss.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Many look down on this ideal. "How can you
make everybody happy?" they spit.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: "What can one person do alone?" they sneer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
"Who will follow a half-grown monarch?" they
scoff.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
For years now, I have striven to personally prove
those doubts false.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Only now do I understand that I was wrong.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I cannot make everybody happy... I must trust in everyone's capacity to win happiness for themselves.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Nor can I accomplish anything alone... I must trust
in the comrades who stand by my side.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And sure enough, nobody will follow a half-grown
monarch. That is why I must first have absolute
faith in my own path.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Let me speak now to you—you beyond the
screen, listening to or reading these words—you
whom perhaps I will one day meet face-to-face.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
My name is Symboli Rudolf, the Emperor, and
today I have taken my place as the greatest of all
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
By the crowns I have won, I swear to be true to
your dreams.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And to those who seek glory, I bid you, come
before my throne.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I will welcome your challenge with open arms.
